basic_info.description: I'm Carlos Ceballos 👋. I enjoy meeting new people and gaining new knowledge. I like to learn new things and practice the ones I already master, such as Vue, JavaScript and Python. This is just a short introduction; the best way to see that I'm cool is to get to know me. If you like my portfolio, write to me and I'll share the code with you ;) And if you only like my repositories, you can give them a ⭐ or simply fork them. 🩵 Thank you 🩵
